module-2-notes-organizer-project.label: Pwojè: òganizatè nòt
module-2-notes-organizer-project.summary: Òganize yon katab ki an dezòd an nòt, devwa, kòd, ak kopi sekirite avèk kòmand debaz tèminal Linux.

sketch0.title: Rezime òganizatè nòt gwoup etid la

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.title: Kreye katab pou resevwa nòt yo
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.prompt: A study group se dropping off two raw note fichyes for sorting. Create `student-notes-organizer/inbox/math.txt` ak `student-notes-organizer/inbox/history.txt` so both notes se ready nan the intake katab.
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kimilatif. Kòmanse ak espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman yo mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè yo konekte. Kenbe livrab ki te fèt anvan yo epi ajoute yon nouvo travay ki itil.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak ls oswa find pou tcheke espas travay aktyèl la anvan ou chanje li.
help.hint_2: Pa efase fichye ki soti nan etap anvan yo sof si enstriksyon an mande klèman pou netwaye yon fichye tanporè.

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.starterCode: # Sèvi ak tèminal la pou etap pwojè Linux sa a.

0.message: Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.title: Triye nòt yo epi kreye yon kopi sekirite
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.prompt: The study group wants the notes fichyed anvan handoff. Move `math.txt` ak `history.txt` out of `student-notes-organizer/inbox` ak into `student-notes-organizer/classes`, then make a backup kopye of `history.txt` at `student-notes-organizer/backups/history.txt`.
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kimilatif. Kòmanse ak espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman yo mande a.

help.concept: Etap pwojè yo konekte. Kenbe livrab ki te fèt anvan yo epi ajoute yon nouvo travay ki itil.

help.hint_2: Pa efase fichye ki soti nan etap anvan yo sof si enstriksyon an mande klèman pou netwaye yon fichye tanporè.

module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.title: Fini remèt òganizatè a
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.prompt: The notes se sorted ak backed up. Leave a clear handoff marker by kreye `student-notes-organizer/handoff/notes-ready.txt` while keeping the class notes ak backup nan place.
module-2-notes-organizer-project-termina.hint: Sa a se yon etap pwojè kimilatif. Kòmanse ak espas travay anvan an epi ajoute sèlman chanjman yo mande a.

project-synopsis.title: Òganizatè nòt gwoup etid la
project-synopsis.bodyMarkdown:
Ou se preparing a clean fichye handoff for a study group. Build an intake area, sort notes into class katabs, preserve a backup, ak leave a ready marker.

You will complete this as connected project etaps. Each etap starts depi the previous working espas travay, so fè not efase earlier deliverables.
